reasons: Selena's traps and arrow pressure help Hanzo choose safer routes and targets for Hanekage pressure.
Selena can create the first catch, allowing Hanzo to follow with remote chase damage.

proof.summary: Selena improves map control and catch information, while Hanzo uses that information to send Hanekage toward safer pickoff targets.
worksBestWhen: Selena traps jungle entrances before Hanzo commits.
Hanzo follows confirmed control or vision instead of blind diving.
failureCases: Hanzo commits into grouped enemies without follow-up.
Hanekage is killed, slowing and exposing Hanzo after the failed engage.

reasons: Chip can create a portal path that lets Hanzo's teammates collapse on the area Hanzo is pressuring.
Hanzo benefits when the team can join his remote pressure instead of leaving Hanekage to fight alone.

proof.summary: Hanzo pressures from a remote angle, while Chip creates a portal that lets teammates join the target area and convert pressure into a real fight.
worksBestWhen: Chip places Shortcut on a target or area Hanzo is already pressuring.
Hanzo's team uses the portal together instead of one by one.
Hanzo keeps awareness of his real body position before the fight starts.
failureCases: Teammates ignore the portal and Hanzo's pressure becomes isolated.
The enemy uses the portal timing to counter-engage.
Hanzo's real body is discovered while the team commits elsewhere.

reasons: Luo Yi can teleport teammates into a fight area after Hanzo identifies a target or forces enemy movement.
Hanzo's long-range pressure becomes more valuable when Luo Yi can turn it into a coordinated map collapse.

proof.summary: Hanzo pressures or scouts a target path with Hanekage, while Luo Yi moves teammates into position for a coordinated collapse.
worksBestWhen: Luo Yi hides or times Diversion so the enemy cannot easily disengage.
Hanzo confirms the target area before Luo Yi commits the teleport.
Teammates coordinate around the arrival timing.
failureCases: Luo Yi teleports the team after the target already escapes.
Hanzo's real body is moved into danger without proper protection.
The team arrives into enemy crowd control.

reasons: Kaja can suppress a priority target so Hanzo's Hanekage has a safer target to hit.
Hanzo benefits from Kaja's hard lock because remote pressure can fail when enemies freely dash away.

proof.summary: Kaja locks a target in place, while Hanzo sends Hanekage pressure into the controlled target window.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches a squishy or mobile target.
Hanzo is close enough to follow quickly with Hanekage.
failureCases: Hanzo is out of energy or too far to follow.
Enemy teammates collapse after Kaja commits.

reasons: Popol and Kupa can add trap-based map control that supports Hanzo's jungle pressure.
Extra vision helps Hanzo avoid sending Hanekage into bad fights or enemy collapse zones.

proof.summary: Popol and Kupa add trap vision and control, while Hanzo uses that map information to invade, poke, or pick targets more safely.
worksBestWhen: Traps cover jungle entrances and objective paths.
failureCases: Traps are placed in predictable or visible zones.
Hanzo ignores the vision and dives blind.
The team lacks follow-up despite having vision control.
